textByHash.05c4e0bc68700dbdf5bfb396e9d1761d7fd59a76: Yes, it can refine it into pure essence. However, it can also give you extracts.
textByHash.119a08e482e0b0918a3fedb5cdd2809eeb8b1cb7: I must thank you, friend. You've been a strong supporter of the cause.
textByHash.166bdb8ea3bc56e9e1e1aae0a4d3d541d330f0f9: Hey, what are you doing? I haven't finished talking to you.
textByHash.1c92d322d652a127ca87d3ff3ed6f525d30dbc92: I mean. I'm sure you'd like some extracts.
textByHash.205a87292a1ed660daddd909459f75498aa85162: That's the one! Where did you find this?
textByHash.26d5cbdec6fa171cdcf1651c3106f3bfea741398: A pickaxe can help you split off the essence from the amalgamations.
textByHash.287d36241a6366641b7677f1868087fb43982b18: It likes the tainted essence you can find in here.
textByHash.29246a6eabcba1826037e05da448228027644f10: Another wrath rune? For me? Don't mind if I do!
textByHash.301cb89a7ed5e02671f325d654ad27ebda6101ca: Ah, where were we. Did you feed Ventriculus yet? We need more-
textByHash.3410d242da4b4642391b51746abbfb1afa1a2c6e: Grrr! Fine. But I urge you to reconsider.
textByHash.3eff3cc9c7e71daabc66401a94c2c0b94df19f5c: Ventriculus will remove excess parts from the essence, chew it up a little, and spit out the rest.
textByHash.430a17bb8f0cd220997702598fed6931d0772e27: If you bring an extract when you runecraft, it multiplies the amount of runes you make.
textByHash.4667518c575353b413e34f52a476765c048714f3: Well, you found me. I'm here. And I was just in the middle of a very important conversation!
textByHash.4ccfb59fa20154c6c821cbb441d5c2b72f76f0d1: We heard rumours of a strong one... but the altar was nowhere to be found.
textByHash.5983cca94c402e5f95168d874c572c753d0fe338: My spells will be so powerful now!
textByHash.6353911ee9ef8316fd64b25698a87bcf5fc94ccb: Why should I tell you? You could be one of them.
textByHash.6360486bc70ecf2a9956b16b92cc3b4d2c69b916: Have you heard of the Scar?
textByHash.70261857f25b2e1e8b7dfb7db9d120243c692c8c: Now, tell me, where does it come from? Where's the altar?
textByHash.7425c4032e34914ecd045d8780368a701a477820: And they said it couldn't be done. That there was no such thing!
textByHash.74aeb6597ee09cd438d1418d0704143395e8a47e: Ventriculus is an extractor. Feed it and you'll see.
textByHash.76c0fff4bc409ca176e9c08192d46129ff765611: I can't hold more wrath runes.
textByHash.7e542730cfdb5700e52c5d69295c2c9775e0e64a: I can now return and take my rightful place.
textByHash.803038d64968d03829a1da4df1a75a6967562794: Now hold on. I didn't say this was free.
textByHash.865d78b7cb07485288cdcbfe35ab73ef869c4c0e: You just interrupted a very important conversation!
textByHash.8a8a4c4ac43b7576b4dd8029563b55aa950b1b16: The final product is either pure essence or dense rune extracts.
textByHash.92fffab80d81403ca5f9c88982dd76d9a652c252: Another one! [laugh]! The others won't believe this!
textByHash.a1437702dc5b115021bafe4aeeabfd0bcde85a82: I must have one. To study it. Can I have it?
textByHash.a8adb2f6c139c8e6f16f80ab2cf0e2640563a800: Ventriculus is an extractor. You can feed it essence from the amalgamations here.
textByHash.b02272a9bf2ed08d347f6e7ad9780f3a1cd69f63: Yes. Just put your arm in.
textByHash.b246059fcbe991b3eb48d51980229f21f02b20b7: I don't care about pure essence. You can extract as much as you want of that.
textByHash.b3c2fc7223fc9211c78b67e5736f8f44916db20c: However, extracts are valuable. I'll demand some payment for those.
textByHash.ba444b496d19a13461bc6d9c7c8c82be29ee198f: Hand it over! I need it.
textByHash.ba812ca78e8302df7f41016f0b5879b4feac652f: Many years. Years. Time... Yes, time. It's time I showed them. I need to find the rune.
textByHash.baa7c925b0211287e886d21bf1d757bf20c61d40: I'm hanging out with my friend.
textByHash.bbd2d49018b952120cfc5f89d67393b73d5eac11: Once fed, it churns away, picking apart the essence, leftover runes and flesh.
textByHash.c4734ab5f9f7a1249060cca8e0e20c075bef074f: Well then you know where we are.
textByHash.c5c61fb5aff8d60f71baf4306680350b7f857c68: Unless you're a member of the Institute, I cannot share that with you.
textByHash.ca019ad4157cf908dd453dc1426b9175de3fc6de: Herbert, Finnigan and I... We were all assigned important missions. I must fulfill mine.
textByHash.cce4f254b66b24e3bcdc2717e98c357f25acc332: Extracts function as catalysts to make more runes.
textByHash.cf54ef06cd28bd54fe1f9a0205a744f46fe8476b: It's helping me search for knowledge on powerful runes.
textByHash.d05aa3c1fb2eb8d4a3ad691d077c4ee63bbe16fc: But for extracts, you've got to pay up. There's a coffer over there. Leave some money and I'll charge you for the extract you want.
textByHash.d075c2aa88af693e813fd7e96db1e0c1c76517dd: The power of these runes... It's drawing me in... And I love it! May I have it?
textByHash.d1302ee9fe77f35ad14821af962fde4582be8983: My upbringing is none of your concern.
textByHash.d273dcacb8b954317cdfe27648bebbe3ec1d9c2f: Another wrath rune! Can I have it?
textByHash.e688c392e15ef84ae727ef0949d381cf2225cb8a: Leave me alone. I'm not interested in whatever you have to show me.
textByHash.e78d7efa67c29bf1ce76cdbba2eb9aad0b062c66: Extracts are powerful, condensed runes. They function as catalysts to make more runes.
textByHash.ea5e77449a583767177639a76b25700fe6d528a0: Remember how I said it's an extractor?
textByHash.f240827bcb48df0341c8155bd35db2f89106fcbc: Shaz- Oh, what's this? Ah, yes. A powerful rune indeed.
textByHash.f511f22685ad5049ef61b1971472e579f9993786: You know what? I don't need more wrath runes... Ah who am I kidding.
textByHash.faa770952228bdde8d606fe4d70a1db52e931b0d: I'm not sure what you want me to do with that.
textByHash.fca17bc58265255c6230ac4fea6e0fea43e0eb3a: Yes! More. More wrath runes for my collection. Can I have it?
